//: OPS/Nanos unikernel config for the GitHub webhook microVM. Boots as a
//sovereign: single ELF on a hypervisor (KVM/Firecracker via `-t hvt`) — no OS,
//shell: no shell, no SSH. Matches the sovereign-node hardening (config.sovereign.json).
//secret: GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET is NOT here on purpose — inject it at instance-create
//secret2: time (ops instance create ... -e GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET=... or --envfile). A
//secret3: committed secret is a leak; the daemon fail-closes if it is empty/absent.
